forParents.title: For Parents
forParents.subtitle: World-class guidance at a fraction of traditional costs
forParents.insight: The most relevant advice comes from students already inside your child's dream school — not career advisors who graduated 20 years ago.

safe.title: Is it safe?
safe.desc: Every counsellor is verified with enrollment proof and government ID before their first session. You see exactly who is guiding your child.

worth.title: Is it worth it?
worth.desc: From $35/session vs. $15,000–$25,000 for a traditional agency package. Same outcome, dramatically less cost.

effective.title: Will it actually work?
effective.desc: Our counsellors got into Harvard, Stanford, and MIT as international students — the exact same journey your child is on.

forParents.trust: All counsellors are verified with enrollment proof and government ID.
